notes:
Use the Kyocera PPD file for PostScript, Instructions
In case of less than 4MB memory 600dpi may not work for all printouts (use 300dpi instead)
PCL5e as well (use ljet4 or ljet4d for PCL5e)
In case of duplex option use ljet4d for PCL5e and duplex

Maximum paper width: 11.7 inches / 29.7 cm (Wide format printer)

Printing engine speed: 28 pages/min
